parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload) VALUES ('e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid, 'nurture_deenroll_prompt', 'triggered', json_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}')::jsonb)

SELECT l.id, l.lead_name, l.email, l.phone, l.source, l.metadata, l.nurture_enrolled_at, c.primary_contact_email AS agent_email, c.primary_contact_name AS agent_name FROM leads l JOIN clients c ON l.client_id = c.id WHERE l.status = 'nurturing' AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY c.id, l.nurture_enrolled_at

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.to_email }], subject: $json.subject }], from: { email: 'hello@norrai.co', name: 'Norr AI' }, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: $json.html_body }], tracking_settings: { click_tracking: { enable: false } } } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload) VALUES ('e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid, 'nurture_deenroll_prompt', 'completed', json_build_object('lead_count', {{ $json.lead_count }}, 'agent_email', '{{ $json.to_email }}')::jsonb)
